content.thinking: The user is asking about what skills I have available. Let me check the system prompt - it says "(no skills available)" under the skills_available section. So I don't have any skills loaded currently. But I can check if there are any skill files in the workspace that could be loaded.

content.text:
根据系统提示，目前没有可用的技能（`<skills_available>` 中显示 "(no skills available)"）。

不过，我可以帮你查看工作区中是否存在技能文件，让我检查一下：

input.command: dir /s /b E:\daima\gitee\agent-claude\*.md 2>nul || echo "No md files found"
